title: Путешествия и заграница
description: Аэропорт, отель, транспорт, город, проблемы, покупки в поездке.

chunks.en: I'd like to book a room.
examples: I'd like to book a room for two nights.
I'd like to book a room for my family.
I have a reservation under Zarapin.
I have a reservation for three nights.
Could we check in early if the room is ready?
Could we check in early today?
What time is check-out tomorrow?
What time is check-out on Sunday?
Is breakfast included in the price?
Is breakfast included for children?

chunks.en: Can we leave our bags here?
examples: Can we leave our bags here until check-in?
Can we leave our bags here for a few hours?

chunks.en: Where can I find a taxi?
examples: Where can I find a taxi near here?
Where can I find a taxi at the airport?

chunks.en: Could you call a taxi for us?
examples: Could you call a taxi for us, please?
Could you call a taxi to the hotel?

chunks.en: I need to get to the city center.
chunks.ru: Мне нужно добраться до центра города.
examples: I need to get to the city center by metro.
I need to get to the city center before noon.

chunks.en: How long does it take to get there?
examples: How long does it take to get there by taxi?
How long does it take to get there on foot?
Is it far from here by bus?
Is it far from here on foot?

chunks.en: Could you show me on the map?
examples: Could you show me on the map, please?
Could you show me where we are?
Which platform do I need for this train?
Which platform do I need to go downtown?
Where is the entrance to the museum?
Where is the entrance to the station?
Where is the exit from the station?
Where is the exit to the street?
Can I pay by card here?
Can I pay by card on the bus?
Do I need a ticket for my son?
Do I need a ticket for this train?
Where can I buy tickets for the bus?
Where can I buy tickets online?
Our flight was delayed by two hours.
Our flight was delayed, so we arrived late.
Where is the baggage claim area?
Where is the baggage claim for this flight?
My luggage is missing. Can you help me?
My luggage is missing after the flight.

chunks.en: I need help with my luggage.
examples: I need help with my luggage, please.
I need help with my luggage at the airport.
Do you have free Wi-Fi in the room?
Do you have free Wi-Fi here?
The Wi-Fi doesn't work in our room.
The Wi-Fi doesn't work on my phone.

chunks.en: Can you recommend a good place nearby?
examples: Can you recommend a good place nearby for dinner?
Can you recommend a good place nearby for kids?

chunks.en: We are looking for a quiet place.
examples: We are looking for a quiet place to eat.
We are looking for a quiet place near the hotel.
Is this area safe at night?
Is this area safe for walking?
I'm here on vacation with my family.
I'm here on vacation for a week.

chunks.en: We are staying near the center.
examples: We are staying near the center for a few days.
We are staying near the center of the city.

chunks.en: Could you take a photo of us?
examples: Could you take a photo of us, please?
Could you take a photo of us with this view?
Can I have a receipt, please?
Can I have a receipt for this payment?

chunks.en: I think there is a mistake.
examples: I think there is a mistake in the bill.
I think there is a mistake with the booking.

chunks.en: Can you help me with this problem?
chunks.ru: Можете помочь мне с этой проблемой?
examples: Can you help me with this problem at the hotel?
Can you help me with this problem, please?
I need a doctor, please.
I need a doctor for my son.
Where is the nearest pharmacy around here?
Where is the nearest pharmacy open now?
